description_long: This is a robust, cylindrical drinking cup with a prominent, angular handle attached to one side. The main body of the cup is a matte, off-white color with subtle vertical streaks and signs of wear, giving it a slightly rustic appearance. Two thick, glossy blue bands encircle the top and bottom of the cup, with matching blue material forming the handle and a vertical strip down the back. The blue sections have a marbled, stone-like texture, contrasting with the smoother, lighter body. The interior appears to be lined with the same glossy blue material as the bands and handle. The cup is solid and sturdy, suitable for holding beverages in a variety of urban settings such as cafes, parks, or outdoor events.
description: A sturdy, cylindrical cup with a marbled blue handle and bands, and a worn off-white body. The cup has a rustic yet decorative appearance, with glossy blue accents and a robust build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and the marbled blue bands at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the vertical blue strip running down the back, with the handle mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle fully visible on the left, showing the cup's cylindrical shape and blue accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle not visible, focusing on the off-white body and blue bands.
